form.formComment: Didn't make the placings last time at this track (17.76) in a Class 5 H, finishing a 7 length fifth. Yet to miss the placings in five runs from this box, including two wins. Key player.

form.formComment: Has been in the money the last two runs. Finished third at Addington in 17.06 last time but the start prior clocked an outstanding 17.10 over 295m finishing second at Addington. Key runner based on recent form.

form.formComment: Won two starts back after racing on the pace at Ascot Park over 457m in 26.35. Couldn't repeat the feat last time out when fourth over 295m at Addington at Class 5 level. Is a danger.

form.formComment: Got back last start and could only manage fifth but before that won by 0.9 lengths at Manawatu (21.29) beating Big Time Tricky in a Class 4 on March 27. Can improve sharply on best.
